title: 'Abel #0067
definition:
Abel Mizraim = "meadow of Egypt"

 1) a place east of the Jordan (perhaps "as fertile as Egypt")
nasbUsage:

 1) a place east of the Jordan (perhaps "as fertile as Egypt")

    NASB:  meadow of Egypt, a place E. of the Jordan
